description: A quality inspector must verify that the newly installed windows match the model number specified in the project's technical specifications.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the technical specification document for windows.

expected_outcome.value: The 'Section 085113 - Aluminum Windows' spec is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Physically check the model number on one of the installed windows.

expected_outcome.value: The model number on the window is noted.

nodes.task_description: Compare the installed model number with the one required in the specification document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the installed windows match the specification.
